title: atalantia glauca
intro: Atalantia glauca, also known as the Yellow Atalantia or Wild Atalantia, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family, commonly found in Southeast Asia and Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. Atalantia glauca is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and treating digestive issues. The plant is traditionally prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
